zh.Heinsberg, Heinsberg, North Rhine-Westph: 德國諾爾德海-維斯特法倫海斯格海斯格
zh.Cologne, Rhénanie-du-Nord-Westphalie, A: 德國諾爾德海-維斯特法倫可爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Dietrich II. von Kleve-Heinsberg-Valkenburg於1221年出生在荷蘭利包格素斯特倫時，他的父親Dietrich I. von Kleve-Heinsberg-Valkenburg32歲，母親Beatrix von Kyrburg Daun41歲。他於1246年之後與Bertha van Limburg結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1268年10月15日在德國諾爾德海-維斯特法倫可爾享年47歲。

zh-hans.Heinsberg, Heinsberg, North Rhine-Westph: 德国諾爾德海-維斯特法倫海斯格海斯格
zh-hans.Cologne, Rhénanie-du-Nord-Westphalie, A: 德国諾爾德海-維斯特法倫可爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Dietrich II. von Kleve-Heinsberg-Valkenburg于1221年出生在荷兰利包格素斯特倫时，他的父亲Dietrich I. von Kleve-Heinsberg-Valkenburg32岁，母亲Beatrix von Kyrburg Daun41岁。他于1246年之后与Bertha van Limburg结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1268年10月15日在德国諾爾德海-維斯特法倫可爾享年47岁。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Dietrich
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: II.
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Dietrich II. von Kleve-Heinsberg-Valkenburg was born in 1221, in Susteren, Limburg, Netherlands, his father, Dietrich I. von Kleve-Heinsberg-Valkenburg, was 32 and his mother, Beatrix von Kyrburg Daun, was 41. He married Bertha van Limburg after 1246. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died on 15 October 1268, in Köln, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany, at the age of 47.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Dietrich II. von Kleve-Heinsberg-Valkenburg est né en 1221, à Susteren, Limbourg, Pays-Bas, son père, Dietrich I. von Kleve-Heinsberg-Valkenburg, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Beatrix von Kyrburg Daun, avait 41 ans. Il a épousé Bertha van Limburg après 1246. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 15 octobre 1268, à Köln, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Allemagne, à l’âge de 47 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Dietrich II. von Kleve-Heinsberg-Valkenburg 1221 in Susteren, Limburg, Niederlande geboren wurde, war sein Vater Dietrich I. von Kleve-Heinsberg-Valkenburg 32 und seine Mutter Beatrix von Kyrburg Daun 41. Er hat nach 1246 Bertha van Limburg geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 15. Oktober 1268 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Köln, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Deutschland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Dietrich II. von Kleve-Heinsberg-Valkenburg è nato il nel 1221 nel Susteren, Limburgo, Paesi Bassi, il suo padre, Dietrich I. von Kleve-Heinsberg-Valkenburg, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Beatrix von Kyrburg Daun, aveva 41 anni. Lui sposato Bertha van Limburg dopo il 1246. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 15 ottobre 1268, nel Köln, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Germania, all'età di 47 anni.

ja.Susteren, Limburg, Netherlands: オランダリンブルグスステレン
ja.Heinsberg, Heinsberg, North Rhine-Westph: ドイツノードルヘイン-ウエストファレンヘインスバーグヘインスバーグ
ja.Sittard, Limburg, Nederland: オランダリンブルグシッタルド
ja.Cologne, Rhénanie-du-Nord-Westphalie, A: ドイツノードルヘイン-ウエストファレンクoルン
ja.lifeSummary: Dietrich II. von Kleve-Heinsberg-Valkenburgが1221年にオランダリンブルグスステレンで生まれた時，父Dietrich I. von Kleve-Heinsberg-Valkenburgは32歳，母Beatrix von Kyrburg Daunは41歳であった。1246年以後にBertha van Limburgと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1268年10月15日にドイツノードルヘイン-ウエストファレンクoルンで47歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Dietrich II. von Kleve-Heinsberg-Valkenburg(이)가 1221년 네덜란드 림버그 수스테런에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Dietrich I. von Kleve-Heinsberg-Valkenburg(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Beatrix von Kyrburg Daun(은)는 41세였다. 그는 1246년 이후 Bertha van Limburg(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1268년 10월 15일 독일 노르드하이-w스트파렌 ko에서 47세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Dietrich II. von Kleve-Heinsberg-Valkenburg nasceu em 1221, em Susteren, Limburgo, Países Baixos, seu pai, Dietrich I. von Kleve-Heinsberg-Valkenburg, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Beatrix von Kyrburg Daun, tinha 41 anos. Ele casou-se com Bertha van Limburg após 1246. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 15 de outubro de 1268, em Köln, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemanha, com 47 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Dietrich II. von Kleve-Heinsberg-Valkenburg родился в 1221 г. в местности сустирен, лимбург, Нидерланды, его отцу по имени Dietrich I. von Kleve-Heinsberg-Valkenburg было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Beatrix von Kyrburg Daun, 41. Он женился на женщине по имени Bertha van Limburg после 1246 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер 15 октября 1268 г. в местности кoлн, нордраин-вестфеилен, Германия в возрасте 47 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Dietrich II. von Kleve-Heinsberg-Valkenburg nació en 1221, en Susteren, Limburg, Países Bajos, su papá, Dietrich I. von Kleve-Heinsberg-Valkenburg, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Beatrix von Kyrburg Daun, tenía 41 años. Se casó con Bertha van Limburg después de 1246. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 15 de octubre de 1268, en Köln, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemania, a la edad de 47 años.
